# termcn

> A shadcn-compatible component registry built with Next.js.

## What is this?

termcn is a project for publishing custom UI components that consumers can install with the shadcn CLI (`npx shadcn add`). It includes documentation, a landing page, and a build step that emits registry JSON.

## How it works

1. Edit components under `registry/new-york/`
2. List them in `registry.json`
3. Run `pnpm registry:build`
4. Deploy; share `https://your-site.com/r/<item>.json` URLs

## Installation (for consumers)

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://your-site.com/r/your-component.json
```

## Links

- Documentation: https://termcn.vercel.app/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/termcn/termcn
- shadcn registry format: https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/registry

## Tech Stack

- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Fumadocs
- shadcn CLI / registry format
